  {"title": "attexis-RCT zeigt klinisch relevante Reduktion der ADHS-Symptomatik bei ...", "external_url": "https://gaia-group.com/de/news/reduktion-adhs-symptomatik-erwachsene.html", "source_page_url": "gaia-group.com", "snippet": "The results provide robust clinical evidence that digital cognitive behavioral therapy interventions can provide adults with ADHD with effective and well-accepted treatment.
